Package com.teamMatcha.pos

Class Database

java.lang.Object
com.teamMatcha.pos.Database
public class Database extends Object
Handles all database operations for the Boba Shop POS system. This includes managing products, inventory, employees, and orders.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    Database.InventoryUsageRow
    Represents a row in the inventory usage report.
    static class 
    Database.MenuIngredientRow
    Represents an ingredient for a menu item.
    static class 
    Database.PopularItemRow
    Represents a row in the popular items report.
    static class 
    Database.SalesReportRow
    Represents a row in the sales report.
    static class 
    Database.StockLevelRow
    Represents a row in the stock level report.
    static class 
    Database.WeeklyOrdersRow
    Represents a row in the weekly orders report.
    static class 
    Database.ZReportData
    Represents the data for a full Z-Report.
    static class 
    Database.ZReportRow
    Represents a row in the Z-Report (employee orders summary).

    • Database

      public Database()

  • Method Details

    • getSalesReport

      public static List<Database.SalesReportRow> getSalesReport(LocalDate startDateInclusive, LocalDate endDateInclusive)
      Retrieves a sales report for a specific date range.
      Parameters:
      startDateInclusive - The start date of the report (inclusive).
      endDateInclusive - The end date of the report (inclusive).
      Returns:
      A list of SalesReportRow objects.

    • getConnection

      public static Connection getConnection() throws SQLException
      Establishes a connection to the PostgreSQL database.
      Returns:
      A Connection object.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database credentials are not set or connection fails.

    • getAllProducts

      public static List<Product> getAllProducts()
      Retrieves all products from the menu table.
      Returns:
      A list of Product objects.

    • getMenuItemIngredients

      public static List<Database.MenuIngredientRow> getMenuItemIngredients(int menuID)
      Retrieves ingredients for a specific menu item.
      Parameters:
      menuID - The ID of the menu item.
      Returns:
      A list of MenuIngredientRow objects.

    • addMenuItem

      public static boolean addMenuItem(String name, double cost)
      Adds a new menu item to the database.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the menu item.
      cost - The cost of the menu item.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • addMenuItemWithIngredients

      public static boolean addMenuItemWithIngredients(String name, double cost, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredientQtyByInventoryId)
      Adds a new menu item along with its ingredients to the database.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the menu item.
      cost - The cost of the menu item.
      ingredientQtyByInventoryId - A map of inventory IDs to their quantities.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • updateMenuItem

      public static boolean updateMenuItem(int menuID, String name, double cost)
      Updates an existing menu item's details.
      Parameters:
      menuID - The ID of the menu item to update.
      name - The new name.
      cost - The new cost.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • deleteMenuItem

      public static boolean deleteMenuItem(int menuID)
      Deletes a menu item from the database.
      Parameters:
      menuID - The ID of the menu item to delete.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • getAllInventory

      public static List<InventoryItem> getAllInventory()
      Retrieves all items from the inventory.
      Returns:
      A list of InventoryItem objects.

    • updateInventoryItem

      public static boolean updateInventoryItem(int id, String name, double cost, int qty, int avg)
      Updates an existing inventory item's details.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the inventory item to update.
      name - The new name.
      cost - The new cost per unit.
      qty - The new quantity in stock.
      avg - The new usage average.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • addInventoryItem

      public static boolean addInventoryItem(String name, double cost, int qty, int avg)
      Adds a new inventory item to the database.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the inventory item.
      cost - The cost per unit.
      qty - The initial quantity.
      avg - The usage average.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • deleteInventoryItem

      public static boolean deleteInventoryItem(int inventoryID)
      Deletes an inventory item from the database.
      Parameters:
      inventoryID - The ID of the inventory item to delete.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • getAllEmployees

      public static List<Employee> getAllEmployees()
      Retrieves all employees from the database.
      Returns:
      A list of Employee objects.

    • addEmployee

      public static void addEmployee(String name, String job, double pay)
      Adds a new employee to the database.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the employee.
      job - The job title of the employee.
      pay - The pay rate of the employee.

    • updateEmployee

      public static void updateEmployee(int empID, String name, String job, double pay)
      Updates an existing employee's details.
      Parameters:
      empID - The ID of the employee to update.
      name - The new name.
      job - The new job title.
      pay - The new pay rate.

    • deleteEmployee

      public static void deleteEmployee(int empID)
      Deletes an employee from the database.
      Parameters:
      empID - The ID of the employee to delete.

    • getWeeklyOrders

      public static List<Database.WeeklyOrdersRow> getWeeklyOrders()
      Retrieves weekly order counts.
      Returns:
      A list of WeeklyOrdersRow objects.

    • getPopularItems

      public static List<Database.PopularItemRow> getPopularItems(int limit)
      Retrieves the most popular menu items.
      Parameters:
      limit - The maximum number of items to retrieve.
      Returns:
      A list of PopularItemRow objects.

    • getInventoryUsage

      public static List<Database.InventoryUsageRow> getInventoryUsage(LocalDate startDateInclusive, LocalDate endDateInclusive)
      Retrieves inventory usage for a specific date range.
      Parameters:
      startDateInclusive - The start date (inclusive).
      endDateInclusive - The end date (inclusive).
      Returns:
      A list of InventoryUsageRow objects.

    • getLowestStock

      public static List<Database.StockLevelRow> getLowestStock(int limit)
      Retrieves inventory items with the lowest stock levels.
      Parameters:
      limit - The maximum number of items to retrieve.
      Returns:
      A list of StockLevelRow objects.

    • canFulfillOrder

      public static boolean canFulfillOrder(List<CartItem> cartItems)
      Checks if the order can be fulfilled based on current inventory.
      Parameters:
      cartItems - The items in the order.
      Returns:
      true if there is sufficient stock for all items, false otherwise.

    • submitOrder

      public static void submitOrder(String customer, int empID, List<CartItem> cartItems)
      Submits an order and updates inventory, menu sales, and employee order counts.
      Parameters:
      customer - The name of the customer.
      empID - The ID of the employee.
      cartItems - The items being ordered.

    • restockItem

      public static void restockItem(String itemName, int quantity)
      Restocks a specific inventory item.
      Parameters:
      itemName - The name of the item.
      quantity - The quantity to add to the current stock.

    • getLowStockItems

      public static List<InventoryItem> getLowStockItems(int threshold)
      Retrieves inventory items with stock levels below a threshold.
      Parameters:
      threshold - The threshold below which an item is considered low stock.
      Returns:
      A list of InventoryItem objects.

    • getEmployeeByID

      public static Employee getEmployeeByID(int employeeID)
      Retrieves an employee by their ID.
      Parameters:
      employeeID - The ID of the employee.
      Returns:
      An Employee object, or null if not found.

    • getXReports

      public static List<XReports> getXReports(LocalDate date)
      Retrieves X-Reports for a specific date.
      Parameters:
      date - The date.
      Returns:
      A list of XReports objects.

    • getZReport

      public static Database.ZReportData getZReport()
      Retrieves Z-Report data.
      Returns:
      A ZReportData object.

    • clearOrdersToday

      public static void clearOrdersToday()
      Clears daily order data.

    • updateMenuIngredients

      public static void updateMenuIngredients(int menuID, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
      Updates the ingredients for a specific menu item.
      Parameters:
      menuID - The ID of the menu item.
      ingredients - A map of inventory IDs to their required quantities.
